DatabaseName: TAS Analyst Windows Security Event Encyclopedia
Purpose: Offline analyst-friendly event lookup with Event ID, name, category, subcategory, priority, key fields, triage questions, related events and public reference links.
SourceNote: Event IDs and concise names are aligned to the public Ultimate Windows Security Security Log Encyclopedia index. TAS adds its own analyst guidance, quick filters and triage questions; it does not copy full encyclopedia pages.
